content.full_text:
February 25, 1992

Mr. Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 600
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

I am writing to confirm the oral advice you gave me on Friday, February 21, 1992. In response to my questions, you indicated that it is legal under the Political Reform Act for me to use funds from my campaign committee to pay for expenses incurred, including but not limited to transportation, to bring children from my district to the Capitol.

You also informed me that it is legal under the Political Reform Act for my campaign committee to receive a contribution for the specific purpose of bringing the children to the Capitol.

Thank you for your time and assistance regarding this matter.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
BARBARA LEE
Assemblywoman, 13th District
